name: Assorted Vegetables in Clear Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Crab meat or shell shrimp
recipeInstructions:
PREPARATION: Peel the turnips and carrots. Use a melon scoop to cut the turnips into large balls. Slice the carrots 1/2 inch thick; then, with a paring knife, cut 4 evenly spaced notches into the rim of each slice (do not cut into the core). The carrots should look like little flowers. Parboil the turnip and carrot pieces in stock until barely tender. Remove from stock and plunge the pieces into cold water; drain. Cut onions, asparagus, and baby corn into 1 1/2 inch pieces.
STIR FRYING: In a small pot or beaker on medium heat, render the chicken fat. Add peanut oil to a hot wok. When it begins to smoke, briskly fry the crab meat or shrimp for 1 minute. Add asparagus, baby corn, mushrooms, and water chestnuts, stir-frying until they are hot. Add ginger mixture, then onions. Stir another 30 seconds. Add half stock, salt, and sugar; bring to boil. Add turnips and carrots. Cover and reduce heat; simmer for 5 minutes. Uncover, push ingredients out of the liquid, and dribble in cornstarch paste to thicken slightly. Stir the liquid to prevent lumping while it thickens to a thick soup. Recombine, then mix in chicken oil. Remove to serving platter.
